chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-19 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.3132/2022. 2. For orders on M.A. No.1979/2022. 3. For orders on office objections. 4. For orders on MA No.380/2022. 5. For hearing of main case. 11.04.2022 Mr. Muhammad Tahir Nizamani, Advocate for the applicant. == The applicant in order to enforce an earlier order filed another application under section 22 A & B 6 (i) & (iii) Cr.P.C, it was dismissed by learned Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Shahdadpur, for non-prosecution, such order is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of preferring instant criminal miscellaneous application. The order which is impugned has not been passed on merits to be examined by this Court; consequently the instant criminal miscellaneous application being misconceived is dismissed in limine with an advice to the applicant to repeat his application before learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace for its disposal on merits. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
